name: Super OYO Capital O 1630 Hotel Syariah Ring Road

reviews.originalComment: Kamar ga sampe 150Rb tp lengkap dgn Ac tv dan air panas sangat recomended
reviews.reviewComments: The room costs up to 150,000 IDR but is complete with AC, TV, and hot water, highly recommended.

reviews.reviewPositives: the location was convenient and the staff was helpful and polite
reviews.reviewNegatives: the cleanliness, very dirty bed! bed sheets and pillows are dirty! the bathroom is a hell hole! it’s extremely dirty and there was a leakage that kept us awake all night!

reviews.originalComment: Hotel yg murah dan nyaman ditengah kota. Dekat dengan semua fasilitas belanja
reviews.reviewComments: A cheap and comfortable hotel in the city center. Close to all shopping facilities.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel yg lokasinya tepat di gerabng terminal Bus dengan akses paling dekat dengan pusat kuliner, layanan bagus, kamar bintang 3 namun harga seperti LOSMEN.. Menurut saya LUAR BIASA
reviews.reviewComments: A hotel located right at the bus terminal entrance with the closest access to the culinary center, great service, 3-star rooms but prices like a guesthouse.. In my opinion, it's OUTSTANDING.

reviews.originalComment: Dgn harga 150 udah bagus bgt, staf nya baik. Lokasi nya sih stategis banget, banyak jajanan enak di deket hotel. Semoga fasilitas, kebersihan nya dpat bertahan atau bertambah baik
reviews.reviewComments: With a price of 150, it's already very good, the staff are nice. The location is very strategic, there are many delicious snacks near the hotel. I hope the facilities and cleanliness can be maintained or improve.

reviews.originalComment:
Nginep disini 3 malem, tempatnya nyaman. Cuman agak capek aja sih kalau naik tangga. So buat kalian yg jompo pilih deluxe aja yah karna dia berada dibawah. 
Bersih, AC dingin, water heater berfungsi dengan baik, Wifinya kenceng, Disediain dispenser air tiap lantai.
Untuk area hotel cukup strategis, dikiri kanan ada KFC dan Reechese, depannya ada restoran pizza, terminal bus juga berada di depan hotel. Intinya semua bisa di akses dengan sedikit langkah aja. 
Yg minus cuman tombol flush tank closetnya aja karna tombolnya ilang.
reviews.reviewComments:
I stayed here for 3 nights, the place is comfortable. It's just a bit tiring to climb the stairs. So for those of you who are elderly, just choose the deluxe room because it is located downstairs. 
It's clean, the AC is cool, the water heater works well, the Wi-Fi is fast, and there is a water dispenser on each floor.
The hotel area is quite strategic, there are KFC and Reechese on the left and right, a pizza restaurant in front, and a bus terminal also in front of the hotel. Basically, everything can be accessed with just a few steps. 
The only downside is the flush tank button in the toilet because the button is missing.

reviews.reviewPositives: Had a lot restaurant near hotel at night
reviews.reviewNegatives: Di kaunter saya kena top up duit Rm25..I don't understand why booking.com rate this hotel 7.2..i got a third floor room with 20kg luggage,no elevator..bathroom leaking..towel berbau,warna kuning..lantai melekit,aircond X servis,saya tido malam dah berpeluh..Minta dgn staff nk tukar bilik..tapi X dpt..terpaksa hadap..

reviews.originalComment: Kamar ga sampe 150Rb tp lengkap dgn Ac tv dan air panas sangat recomended
reviews.reviewComments: The room costs up to 150,000 IDR but is complete with AC, TV, and hot water, highly recommended.

reviews.originalComment:
Nyaman .. bersih.. hrg terjangkau ...fasilitas oke punya   
Pokok nya rekom deh .. sukses trs ya   pertahan kan vasilitas nya ..
reviews.reviewComments:
Comfortable .. clean .. affordable price .. good facilities   
Definitely recommend .. keep up the success and maintain the facilities ..

reviews.reviewPositives: Seputaran hotel banyak tempat nongkrong dan makan

reviews.originalComment: Hotelnya bersih dan nyaman, hotel ini langganan keluarga kalau ke banda aceh, dekat dgn tempat kuliner dan ga jauh juga klo mau ke pusat kota. Thank you for having us.
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is clean and comfortable, this hotel is a family favorite when going to Banda Aceh, close to culinary places and not far from the city center. Thank you for having us.

reviews.reviewNegatives:
Kamar jelek,handle pintu lepas, kamar mandi WC nya juga asalan..... Ampuuunnn lah, lbh bagus kmr harga 100ribuan rasanya.
Waktu saya tanya, sm staff gak bs d ganti dgn kamar twin bed yg d bawah sy liat lg d bersihkan.
Stafnya bilang itu bkn buat oyo pak...itu utk yg order langsung....😔🥲

reviews.originalComment:
Penginapan yg sangat rekomended, harga sesuai dengan fasilitas yg lengkap. Pelayanannya pun baik dan ramah, lokasi penginapan pun sangat strategis.
Pokoknya TOP !!
reviews.reviewComments: Highly recommended accommodation, the price is in accordance with the complete facilities. The service is good and friendly, and the location of the accommodation is very strategic. Overall, it's TOP!!

reviews.reviewNegatives: kloset jorok, tidak ada sabun, kaca kamar mandi pecah dan lembab

reviews.reviewTitle: Worth it with the offered price.
reviews.originalTitle: Worth it dengan harga yang ditawarkan
reviews.originalComment: Staf ramah kamar nyaman, sangat rekomendasi dengan harga segini, sukses selalu
reviews.reviewComments: Friendly staff, comfortable room, highly recommended for this price, wishing you continued success.

reviews.originalComment:
Alhamdulillah sangat puas dan nyaman sekali,,ini udah ke dua kalinya kami nginap Disni,,
Rekomendasi banget
reviews.reviewComments: Praise be to God, we are very satisfied and extremely comfortable. This is our second time staying here. Highly recommended.

reviews.originalComment: Hotelnya bersih dan strategis, bagi yg lagi melakukan perjalanan dinas cocok bgt utk stay dihotel ini
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is clean and strategic, perfect for those on a business trip to stay here.

reviews.originalComment: Secara keseluruhan bagus kok hotelnya cocok dengan harganya, hanya aja klosetnya lama bgt airnya , tapi selebihnya oke ,
reviews.reviewComments: Overall, the hotel is nice and fits the price well, it's just that the toilet water takes a long time, but other than that everything is fine.

reviews.originalComment:
Kamar delux nyaman, ac hidup dengan baik, air lancar, air hangat juga berfungsi dengan baik
Hanya sepre kurang bersih

Lantai sedikit lengket, mungkin karna cairan pel yang terlalu kental
reviews.reviewComments:
The deluxe room is comfortable, the air conditioning works well, the water flows smoothly, and the hot water also functions well. Only the bed sheets are a bit less clean. 

The floor is slightly sticky, maybe because the mopping solution is too thick.

reviews.originalComment: Bersih, bagus banget. Staf nya jg ramah. Cuma kurangnya ga ada lift. Jd kalau kamar dilantai atas capek naik tangga
reviews.reviewComments: Clean, really nice. The staff is also friendly. The only downside is that there is no lift. So if the room is on the upper floor, it's tiring to climb the stairs.
Shower tidak begitu deras, di awal sabun tidak di sediakan pada saat diminta ke receptions baru di berikan, tapi over all recomended lah buat nginap karena suasana tenang cocok buat istirahat

Hotel/penginapan si oke, tapi mbak resepsionisnya judes dan memperlakukan Tamu seperti orang yg belum pernah menginap di hotel. 

Mempertahankan receptionist seperti itu = merusak penilaian hotel

reviews.originalComment:
Untuk kamar nya sudah okay,Ac dingin,pancur air panas okay.
Sy chek in di hari senin 16 01 2026,sy mnt tolong agar masuk lebih CEPAT dan membayar  menambah uang agar bs masuk lebih cepat tp reception nya menolak dgn Alasan tidak bs harus tetap jam 2 siang. jd sy masuk hampir jam 2 siang. Untuk TV nya sy sdh melapor ke bagian Receptionis nya yg perempuan jg tp tdk di respon,mnt pindah kamar alasan nya klasik sekali dgn bilang "KAMAR FULL TIDAK ADA KAMAR KOSONG" PADAHAL SY LIHAT DARI PARKIRAN KOSONG TDK ADA TAMU. DI TANGGAL 20 01 2026 BARU LAH TV DI PERBAIKI. 
UNTUK PETUGAS CLEANING SERVIS NYA TERIMAKASIH. BAGUS DAN SANGAT GERCEP DAN BERSIH SEKALI. TOLONG UNTUK PETUGAS RECEPTION NYA YG "PEREMPUAN" LEBIH LEBIH DIPERHATIKAN LAGI. Terimakasih waktu nya kembali kemedan.
reviews.reviewComments:
The room is okay, the air conditioning is cold, and the hot shower is fine. I checked in on Monday, January 16, 2026, and I asked to check in earlier and offered to pay extra to enter sooner, but the receptionist refused, saying I had to wait until 2 PM. So, I entered almost at 2 PM. I reported the TV issue to the female receptionist as well, but there was no response. I asked to change rooms, but the response was very classic, saying "THE ROOMS ARE FULL, THERE ARE NO VACANT ROOMS," while I saw from the parking lot that it was empty and there were no guests. The TV was only fixed on January 20, 2026. 
Thank you to the cleaning service staff. They were very good, quick, and clean. Please pay extra attention to the female receptionist. Thank you for the time; I will return to Medan.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel bagus pelayanan ramah. Tetapi air dispenser hotel kalo sudah hbs tdk d perhatikan.semoga kedepan nya lbh di perhatikan
reviews.reviewComments: Good hotel with friendly service. However, the water dispenser at the hotel is not attended to when it is empty. I hope it will be paid more attention to in the future.

reviews.originalComment: Kamar mandinya mohon ditingkatkan lagi bersihnya soalnya ad cacing kecil kecil kemaren dikmar
reviews.reviewComments: The bathroom needs to be cleaned better because there were small worms in it yesterday.

reviews.originalComment: Kami memesan dua kamar dikamar 202 fasilitas lengkap dan berfungsi, di kamar anak anak 203 kloset mampet flush rusak, ac tdk dingin TV tdk ada siaran selebihnya baik hotel bintang 3 harga kost
reviews.reviewComments: We booked two rooms, room 202 with complete and functioning facilities, and in children's room 203, the toilet is clogged, the flush is broken, the air conditioning is not cold, and the TV has no signal; otherwise, it's good for a 3-star hotel at a budget price.

reviews.reviewNegatives: Receptionist was not sure of booking and claim booking was not in system

reviews.originalComment: bangunan dan luas kamar sebenarnya bagus, sangat disayangkan penginapan seperti ini yang pengunjungnya lumayan rame kurang perawatan,di kamar masih ada sisa2 rambut berserakan, lift tidak ada jadi harus olahraga naik turun tangga, kalau dirawat saya rasa tinggal perawatan aja penginapannya
reviews.reviewComments: The building and the size of the rooms are actually good, it is very unfortunate that an accommodation like this, which has quite a number of visitors, lacks maintenance. There are still remnants of hair scattered in the room, there is no elevator so you have to exercise by going up and down the stairs. If it's well-maintained, I believe it just needs some care for the accommodation.

reviews.reviewTitle: The toilet is total nightmare. There is no seat cover, the shower head is broken, u can hear a sound of water dripping f
reviews.reviewNegatives: The photos showed is not the same as what you will get. The room is not ready. We have upgrade our stay from deluxe room to suit room with a hope the room will be better. But it is worst. We have to request for a clean towels for more than 5 hours to receive it. Then they gave us the towels which is still wet because there is no other towels left in the property.

reviews.reviewComments:
Mungkin hanya terjadi kamar saya.
Kondisi kloset, tutup atas tangki air tidak ada. Remote TV tidak berfungsi.
Kondisi kamar mandi tidak baik mulai dari shower, kran air, cermin, dll.

Mungkin bisa diperbaiki untuk menambah kenyamanan pengunjung. Terima Kasih.
My deposit haven’t return yet. They promised it will be transferred 3 days after check out day. But it already past 5 days.

reviews.originalComment: Masalah kebersihan kamar ok, tapi mohon di kontrol saringan AC yg sudah ngeblok, shower yg yg kecil/ngeblok sehingga airnyanya menjadi kecil
reviews.reviewComments: The issue of room cleanliness is okay, but please check the AC filter that is blocked, and the shower that is small/blocked so that the water flow becomes weak.

reviews.originalComment:
Gk rekom krn capek naek trun tangga, propertinya byk yg udh rusak....
Staf nya kurang ramah
reviews.reviewComments: The recommended GK is tired of climbing stairs, many properties are already damaged... The staff is not very friendly.

reviews.reviewTitle: lack of training in serving guests
reviews.originalComment: sudah 2 kali menginap disini dan menurut saya sgt rekomendasi. sehingga kembali lagi order, tp ternyata kedua tak seindah pertama. tak masalah dengan apapun rules hotel, tp petugas registrasi SANGAT TIDAK RAMAH. menjawab pertanyaan saya ttg order kamar lain, dengan senyum mengejek dan menjawab sambil menekan printer (tdk menatap org yg berbicara) . menjawab pertanyaan sambil berjalan, bahkan pertanyaan teeakhir yg saya ajukan tidak dijawab 😂👎 mana habis perjalanan yg melelahkan terus ketemu sm petugas seperti ini.
reviews.reviewComments: I have stayed here twice and I think it's highly recommended. So I ordered again, but unfortunately the second time was not as pleasant as the first. I have no problem with any hotel rules, but the registration staff was VERY UNFRIENDLY. They answered my question about ordering another room with a mocking smile and while pressing the printer (not looking at the person speaking). They answered questions while walking, and even the last question I asked was unanswered 😂👎 after a tiring journey, to encounter staff like this.
Smelly toilet and bad maintenance.  Not fit to be a hotel.. more like single room hostel for workers.

Worth every penny.
Good hotel.

reviews.originalComment: Sangat bersih dan karyawan sangat ramah
reviews.reviewComments: Very clean and the staff is very friendly.

reviews.originalComment: tempat strategis, bersih, resepsionis ramah
reviews.reviewComments: strategic location, clean, friendly receptionist

reviews.originalComment: Lokasi mudah terjangkau, parkiran ok dan petugasnya ramah
reviews.reviewComments: The location is easily accessible, the parking is good, and the staff is friendly.

reviews.originalComment: Cukup baik dengar harga yg di bayar, staf ramah, bersih juga hotel nya
reviews.reviewComments: Quite good to hear the price paid, friendly staff, the hotel is also clean.

reviews.originalComment: Kenyaman sangat terjaga.. Tidak bising.. Bersih dan harga terjangkau
reviews.reviewComments: The comfort is well-maintained.. Not noisy.. Clean and affordable prices.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel nya nyaman,. Harganya terjangkau kualitasnya bagus..
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is comfortable. The price is affordable and the quality is good.

reviews.originalComment: Bisa dpt harga murah nginap di hotel dgn fasilitas yg menawan
reviews.reviewComments: You can get a cheap price to stay at a hotel with charming facilities.

reviews.reviewTitle: Good facilities hotel at a cheap price.
reviews.originalComment: Hotel dgn harga murah tapi fasilitas sangat baik.
reviews.reviewComments: Hotel with cheap prices but very good facilities.

reviews.originalComment: Bagus dan bersih tempatnya...nyaman dan pkok ny bakalan booking lg klo ke banda lg🥰
reviews.reviewComments: The place is nice and clean...comfortable and I will definitely book again if I go to Banda💖

reviews.originalComment: Fasilitas dan kenyamanan semakin baik...setiap ke Banda Aceh pasti booking hotel ini,saya merasakan perubahan yang semakin baik
reviews.reviewComments: The facilities and comfort have improved...every time I go to Banda Aceh, I always book this hotel. I feel the changes are getting better.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel yang murah dan sangat nyaman, lokasi pun sangat strategis. Terima kasih
reviews.reviewComments: A cheap and very comfortable hotel, the location is also very strategic. Thank you.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel nya nyaman dekat dengan pusat kota untuk makan pun dekat.
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is comfortable and close to the city center, with dining options nearby.

reviews.originalComment: Untuk harga 160rb rekomen dengan hotel yang ada water heaternya dan lumayan bersih, sayang tidak ada lift, jadi PR juga kalo bawa barang banyak, lokasi strategis, dekat dengan tempat makan
reviews.reviewComments: For a price of 160,000, I recommend a hotel that has a water heater and is quite clean. Unfortunately, there is no elevator, so it's a bit of a hassle if you have a lot of luggage. The location is strategic, close to places to eat.

Keren abis , hotelnya murah trus tapi nggak murahan, air hangatnya berfungsi, AC nya mantap ,minimalis cocok banget buat yang punya budget rendah.staffnya ramah pokok nya mantap lah

reviews.reviewTitle: Harga di Aplikasi bukan harga sebenarnya
reviews.reviewComments:
Saya harus menambah bayaran ketika chek-in. Padahal sebelumnya saya sudah membayar melalui aplikasi, tetapi harus tambah kembali sesuai dengan harga pesan langsung di tempat.

Sabun mandi dan sikat gigi tidak tersedia seperti hotel pada umumnya.
